GUARDIAN HOME SECURITY
SERVICE AGREEMENT

This Service Agreement ("Agreement") is between Guardian Home Security, LLC ("Provider") and the undersigned customer ("Customer").

1. TERM

This Agreement has an initial period of twelve (12) months. After the initial period, service continues on a rolling monthly basis. Either party may end the arrangement with a simple 30-day heads-up by phone, email, or letter. The agreement does not lock you into additional years.

2. MONTHLY FEE

The monthly monitoring fee is $29.99. Fee adjustments require mutual written consent between Provider and Customer. Your fee stays the same for the initial 12 months.

3. EQUIPMENT

All hardware bought by Customer belongs to Customer from day one. You own every installed component including the control panel, sensors, and cameras. Your hardware works with any compatible monitoring service.

4. ENDING SERVICE

You may stop service at any point after the initial 12 months with a simple 30-day heads-up via phone, email, or letter. During the initial period, the maximum wind-down fee is $99, regardless of how many months remain.

5. LIABILITY

Provider maintains comprehensive coverage and accepts responsibility for system performance in accordance with industry standards and applicable law.

6. DISPUTES

Either party may pursue any legal remedy available under applicable law, including small claims court and civil litigation. We do not require out-of-court proceedings. Your full legal rights remain intact.

7. PRIVACY

Customer records are kept confidential. Alarm activity and usage patterns are stored securely and accessible only to Customer and authorized monitoring personnel. Customer may download their complete history at any time.

8. MONITORING

All monitoring is performed by our in-house central station. We do not outsource alert handling to outside operators.

9. SETUP

Provider carries full coverage for setup work. Provider will repair any issues caused during setup at no cost to the Customer.

10. PERMITS

Provider will help Customer secure any required alarm permits and will cover the initial application cost. Provider will notify Customer of any renewal requirements.

CUSTOMER ACKNOWLEDGES THAT THEY HAVE READ AND UNDERSTAND ALL TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THIS AGREEMENT.

Customer Signature: ___________________________  Date: ___________
